creator: odiegit@gmail.com
text:
Dogecoin upstream released v1.3. The PORTVERSION for net-p2p/dogecoin appears to be incorrect and should have been v1.2 rather than v0.6.4.0. Dogecoin is derived from the original Bitcoin client v0.6.4.0, but Dogecoin uses its own version scheme.

Fix: Included is an svn patch to update net-p2p/dogecoin.

Patch attached with submission follows:
